title: StepHop
description: An addon to MineHop Lite that allows you to step up blocks while b-hopping. Great for traversing natural terrain with hills.
body:
Step Hop - A MineHop Addon!

Step Hop adds on to Mine Hop by adding the following features:

* Step Up Blocks While B-Hopping  

...yeah thats it. 

 

This simple change makes natural terrain much easier to traverse!

Have fun flying through your world at mach-10! _NOTE: This Mod Requires __MineHopLite__, **NOT** normal MineHop_
